patch.value:
## Agent need
pm must be a universal PM tool: every project has its own vocabulary, so an agent must reshape types/statuses/fields/workflows through config rather than code.

## Delivered surface (pm-8jdc)
core/schema (types, statuses, fields, workflows, presets, inference); core/config nested-settings + positional-value; core/profile presets/plan/describe/lint; pm init --type-preset.

## Verified by
schema-customization integration and profile-lint tests. Enduring agent-value statement for the customization capability; new work lands in pm-8jdc.
As a coding agent bootstrapping any project, I want to define custom item types, statuses, fields, workflows, and profiles via config, so that pm fits the project's domain without code changes

schema add/remove type|status|field works; per-type workflows are enforced; profiles compose types+statuses+fields+workflows+templates+packages; settings are validated and unknown keys stripped; init --type-preset bootstraps archetypes.
Delivered and maintained by pm-8jdc: custom types/statuses/fields/workflows, archetype profiles, and validated config; schema-completion tracked by open children.
Any project's domain is modeled in pm through config alone.
Schema customization + profiles + validated config shipped.
Delivered and maintained by pm-8jdc: custom types/statuses/fields/workflows, archetype profiles, and validated config; schema-completion tracked by open children.
